break_suggestion: You've been active for {min} minutes. A short break would optimize your performance.
break_suggestions: Hey {name}, you've been going hard for {min} minutes. Stretch those hands — your tendons will thank you.
Operator advisory: {min} minutes of continuous operation. Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds — the 20-20-20 rule. Your eyes need it.
Still grinding after {min} minutes? Respect. But your brain consolidates information better with micro-breaks. Stand up, take 5.
Time check: {min} min nonstop. Stand up, walk around, hydrate. That's not a suggestion — it's an order from your butler.
Your focus has been locked for {min} minutes straight. A 5-minute break now will buy you 30 minutes of sharper thinking later.
{min} minutes in. Quick wellness check: roll your shoulders back, unclench your jaw, relax your forehead. You were tensing up — I could tell.
I've been counting — {min} minutes without a break. Time to step away from the screen. Get some water, look outside, breathe. I'll hold down the fort.
Efficiency report: {min} minutes active. Studies show productivity drops after 90 minutes without rest. Go do something analog for a few minutes.
return_from_idle: Welcome back. You were away for {min} minutes.
hex_greeting: System online. All subsystems nominal. How can I assist you today, {name}?
no_ai_configured: LLM not configured. Open Settings to connect Ollama or an API key.
